top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 'Yes' 
        ELSE 'No' 
    END AS attended
FROM attendance a
JOIN event e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id
JOIN member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id
WHERE m.first_name = 'Maya' 
  AND m.last_name = 'Mclean'
  AND e.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer';

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 'Yes' 
        ELSE 'No' 
    END AS attended
FROM attendance a
JOIN event e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id
JOIN member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id
WHERE m.first_name = 'Maya' 
  AND m.last_name = 'Mclean'
  AND e.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer';

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 
            FROM attendance a
            JOIN event e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id
            JOIN member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id
            WHERE m.first_name = 'Maya' 
              AND m.last_name = 'Mclean'
              AND e.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer'
        ) THEN 'Yes' 
        ELSE 'No' 
    END AS attended

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 'Yes' 
        ELSE 'No' 
    END AS attended
FROM attendance a
JOIN event e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id
JOIN member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id
WHERE m.first_name = 'Maya' 
  AND m.last_name = 'Mclean'
  AND e.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer';

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 
            FROM attendance a
            JOIN event e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id
            JOIN member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id
            WHERE m.first_name = 'Maya' 
              AND m.last_name = 'Mclean'
              AND e.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer'
        ) THEN 'Yes' 
        ELSE 'No' 
    END AS attended

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN (
            SELECT COUNT(*) 
            FROM attendance a
            JOIN event e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id
            JOIN member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id
            WHERE m.first_name = 'Maya' 
              AND m.last_name = 'Mclean'
              AND e.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer'
        ) > 0 THEN 'Yes' 
        ELSE 'No' 
    END AS attended

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 'Yes' 
        ELSE 'No' 
    END AS attended
FROM attendance a
JOIN event e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id
JOIN member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id
WHERE m.first_name = 'Maya' 
  AND m.last_name = 'Mclean'
  AND e.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer';
